description_long: This object is a stylized flower with five broad, rounded petals radiating symmetrically from a central point. The petals are slightly overlapping and have smooth, gently curved edges, giving the flower a soft and delicate appearance. The coloration is a muted, pale lavender or grayish-pink, with no visible markings or gradients. There is no visible stem or leaves attached to the flower, and the center is not distinctly marked, blending seamlessly with the petals. The overall form is flat and low to the ground, suggesting it could be a decorative or simplified representation of a flower. The design is minimalistic, with a focus on the petal arrangement and overall silhouette.
description: A stylized, five-petaled flower with smooth, rounded petals in a pale lavender-gray color and no visible stem or leaves. The petals radiate symmetrically from the center, creating a soft, minimalistic appearance.
description_view_0: From this view, the flower's five petals are clearly visible, with the central petal pointing upward and the others fanning out symmetrically.
description_view_1: This angle shows the petals from a slightly lower perspective, emphasizing the overlapping and the gentle curvature of the petals.
description_view_2: Here, the flower appears flatter, with the petal arrangement forming a near-perfect radial symmetry and the central area blending with the petals.
description_view_3: This view highlights the even spacing and rounded tips of the petals, with the central point of the flower subtly visible.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration, radiating symmetrically from a central point with slight overlapping at the base. The arrangement is whorled, with each petal evenly spaced and forming a circular pattern typical of many ornamental flowers.
